description: Award block that selects one of N tiers based on a count (e.g., number of completed objectives). Written/read by LoadAwardDataCountScale.

serialized_layout.name: m_Counts
serialized_layout.description: Count thresholds for each tier, always 5 entries.

serialized_layout.name: m_Awards
serialized_layout.description: m_ulScales full AWARD_DATA records. See award_data.json.

notes: If m_ulScales is 0, 24 bytes are written (4 + 20, all zeros).
Each AWARD_DATA must be fully parsed before advancing.
